sentences.arabic: تَقَدَّمَ الذَّكَاءُ الِاصْطِنَاعِيُّ بِشَكْلٍ سَرِيعٍ فِي السَّنَوَاتِ الأَخِيرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Umjetna inteligencija je brzo napredovala posljednjih godina.
sentences.translationEn: Artificial intelligence has advanced rapidly in recent years.

sentences.arabic: أَصْبَحَتِ الآلَاتُ قَادِرَةً عَلَى فَهْمِ اللُّغَاتِ وَتَحْلِيلِ البَيَانَاتِ الضَّخْمَةِ.
sentences.translation: Mašine su postale sposobne razumjeti jezike i analizirati ogromne podatke.
sentences.translationEn: Machines have become capable of understanding languages and analyzing big data.

sentences.arabic: يَسْتَخْدِمُ النَّاسُ هَذِهِ التِّقْنِيَةَ فِي حَيَاتِهِمُ اليَوْمِيَّةِ لِتَسْهِيلِ العَمَلِ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi koriste ovu tehnologiju u svakodnevnom životu kako bi olakšali posao.
sentences.translationEn: People use this technology in their daily lives to make work easier.

sentences.arabic: يَعْتَقِدُ الخُبَرَاءُ أَنَّ المُسْتَقْبَلَ سَيَكُونُ مَلِيئًا بِالِابْتِكَارَاتِ الجَدِيدَةِ.
sentences.translation: Stručnjaci vjeruju da će budućnost biti puna novih inovacija.
sentences.translationEn: Experts believe the future will be full of new innovations.

sentences.arabic: هَذَا التَّطَوُّرُ يُسَاعِدُ الشَّرِكَاتِ عَلَى زِيَادَةِ الإِنْتَاجِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj razvoj pomaže kompanijama da povećaju proizvodnju.
sentences.translationEn: This development helps companies increase production.
